subcodes.title: Words spoken at 97 Cadogan Gardens in London, 1913-01-16
subcodes.first_line: The Cause has become very great. Many souls are entering it--souls with different mentalities... Teach the Cause to those who do not know
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity in diversity, @priority over other activities in teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @growth of the Cause
